title: Cheap Lanterns
description: Cheaper lantern recipes for Fabric. Craft lanterns with fewer nuggets so survival builds look better without the stupid iron tax.
body:
# Cheap Lanterns

Lanterns are overpriced in vanilla. This fixes the recipe and moves on.

Cheap Lanterns reduces the crafting cost of lanterns so decorative lighting is easier to use in real survival worlds.

## Recipe changes
- Lanterns use fewer iron nuggets
- Soul Lanterns use fewer iron nuggets
- Copper Lanterns use fewer copper nuggets

## Why use it
- Better survival building flow
- Less grind for decorative lighting
- Great for vanilla+ and builder-focused packs

## Requirements
- Fabric Loader
- Fabric API
